raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad eedufmojahs tus
KUNGS fohti prett Usaju / un
Deews kawe winnu tur tahs
Drohtchibas deht/ un winſch no-
mirre tur peet ta Deewa Schkirsta.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids tappe skun-
migs pahr to / ka tas KUNGS
tahdu Plihſumu padarrijs pee
Usajn. Un nofauze to Weetu
Peerez-Usa/ lihds chodeen.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids bthjajahs to
KUNGU tai Deena/ un fazzijs:
Ka nahks ta KUNGA Schkirsts
pee mannim?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids ne gribbeja
ta KUNGA Schkirstu pee fewi
west us Dahwida Pilsfahtu/ bet
Dahwids likte to atpaklat west
Obed-Eedoma ta Gatitera
Nammâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta KUNga Schkirsts
palikke Obed-Eedoma ta Gatite-
ra Nammâ trihs Mehneſchus /
un tas KUNGS twehtija Obed-
Eedomu un wiſfu winna Nainu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tappe tam Kehni-
nam Dahwidam fluddinahts un
fazzihts: Tas KUNGS irr
Obed-Eedoma Mannim fivehtijs
ar wiſfu/kas tam peederr/ta Dee-
wa Schkirsta labbad. Ta qahje
Dahwids/ un wedde to Deewa
Schkirstu angſcham no Obed-
Eedoma Namma us Dahwida
Pilsfahtu ar Breeku.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad tee/ kas ta KUN-
GA Schkirstu netfe/fefchusSoh-
tus bij pagahjuſchi/ tad tappe
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids lehze ar wiſ-
fu Spehku preekſch ta KUNga
un Dahwids bija apjohtis a-
weenu linnu Eewodn.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta wedde Dahwids / un
wiſfs Israeta Nams ta KUNGa
Schkirstu angſcham/ ar Gawile-
schanu un Basuno Skannu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu ta KUNG-
Schkirsts Dahwida Pilsfaht-
nahze/tad skattijahs MikaleSa-
la Meita zaur Lohgu/ un redsej-
to Kehnizu Dahwidu ta KUNG-
GA Preekſcha detjam unſezzam
un nizzinaja to jawâ Sirđi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad tee nu ta KUNG-
Schkirstu eeiwedde / zehle tee t-
fawa Weeta tahs Telts Widdû-
ko Dahwids preekſch to bij i-
plehtis. Un Dahwidsuppurej
Dedsamo-Uppurus un Patei-
schanas-Uppurus preekſch t-
KUNGA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Dahwids bij be-
dsis Dedsamo-Uppurus un Pa-
teikſchanas-Uppurus uppureht
tad twehtija winſch tohs Gaudi-
eekſch to Wahrdn ta KUNG-
Zebaat.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un winſch tedallija wi-
ſeem Laudim / wiſai Israe-
Draudsei/ tik labbt Wthreem
Seewahin/ weenu Karrafchu/u-
weenu Baltas Gabbalu/ un wee-
nu Wihna Stohpu. Ta nogat-
je wiſti Laudis / ikkatrs fa-
Nammâ.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Kad nu Dahwids atgre-
feh
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
